name: I'm on the beach at *Treasure* Island
description: I'm on the beach at *Treasure* Island
hints: You have reached Treasure Island! There may be buried treasure here.
If you have a shovel, try DIGging here to uncover buried treasure.
DIG with the shovel to find buried treasure. Go SOUTH to explore the graveyard for more.
DIG here with shovel. Go SOUTH to the graveyard and EAST to the barren field. DIG in each location to find all treasures.
notes: Beach on Treasure Island. DIG with shovel to uncover buried treasure. SOUTH leads to the graveyard (room 22). Multiple dig locations across the island contain different treasures.
